title: Add a clear-search button to the search bar
description: The search bar in the top navigation has no way to clear input without selecting all and deleting. Add a small X icon on the right side of the input that clears the field and re-runs the empty search (showing all results).
acceptance_criteria: Given a user with text in the search bar, When they click the X icon, Then the input is cleared and the search results refresh to show the unfiltered list.
Given an empty search bar, When the user has not typed anything, Then the X icon is hidden.

_ground_truth.label: NO_SLICE
_ground_truth.notes: Small, single-purpose, well-scoped. No smells should trigger. Skill must decline.

_source: Trivial polish ticket; representative of small-story sprint filler.
